---
title: "Kostas Moschonas"
image: "kostas_square.jpg"
links:
  - label: Google Scholar   
    url: "https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&user=cvyy3CwAAAAJ&view_op=list_works&sortby=pubdate"
  - label: PubMed   
    url: "https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/?term=moschonas+k&sort=date"
  - label: GitHub
    url: "https://github.com/kostas-moschonas"
  - label: Email
    url: "mailto:k.moschonas@nhs.net"
output:
  postcards::trestles
---

Hi! I am Kostas Moschonas, Cardiology trainee, and PhD candidate at [St Barts Hospital](https://www.bartshealth.nhs.uk/st-bartholomews) and [UCL](https://www.ucl.ac.uk/cardiovascular/research/clinical-science/centre-cardiovascular-disease-imaging).

Currently I research blood flow abnormalities in Hypertrophic Cardiomyopathy.
